nasb.text: for sin, taking an opportunity through the commandment, deceived me and through it killed me.

esv.text: For sin, seizing an opportunity through the commandment, deceived me and through it killed me.

cnv.text: 因為罪藉著誡命把握著機會來欺騙我，並且殺了我。

ccb.text: 因为罪利用诫命趁机引诱我，而且借着诫命杀了我。

csbs.text: 事实上，罪藉着诫命趁机欺骗了我，并藉着诫命杀了我。
